subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Hearken thou unto the call of thy Lord from the direction of the Throne, then render thanks [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی اسمعی ندآء ربک عن جهه العرش ثم اشکری و
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @role and station of women
